zh.lifeSummary: Thomas de Chaworth是William de Chaworth和Joan的兒子，於大約1290年出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾。他於大約1309年與Alice Houby在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1330年在英國萊希斯特斯爾被列為keeper of the peace。他去世於1347年11月6日之後在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Thomas de Chaworth是William de Chaworth和Joan的儿子，于大约1290年出生在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾。他于大约1309年与Alice Houby在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1330年在英国萊希斯特斯爾被列为keeper of the peace。他去世于1347年11月6日之后在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Chaworth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Haworth (Yorkshire), probably from Old English haga ‘hedge, enclosure’ + worth ‘enclosure’.

variants.name: Howarth
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): habitational name from Howarth in Rochdale (Lancashire), possibly from Old English hōh ‘heel, spur of land’ + worth ‘enclosure’. The name may have been confused with Haworth .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: Thomas de Chaworth was born about 1290, in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom as the son of William de Chaworth and Joan. He married Alice Houby about 1309, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. In 1330, his occupation is listed as keeper of the peace in Leicestershire, England. He died after 6 November 1347, in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Thomas de Chaworth est né environ 1290, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de William de Chaworth et Joan. Il a épousé Alice Houby environ 1309, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. En 1330, sa profession de son indiquée est keeper of the peace à Leicestershire, Angleterre. Il est décédé après 6 novembre 1347, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Westminster Abbey, Westminster, London,: Westminster Abbey, Westminster, London, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Thomas de Chaworth wurde um 1290 in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von William de Chaworth und Joan geboren. Er hat um 1309 in England Alice Houby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1330 ist sein Beruf als keeper of the peace in Leicestershire, England aufgeführt. Er starb nach 6. November 1347 in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Thomas de Chaworth è nato il circa 1290 nel Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di William de Chaworth e Joan. Lui sposato Alice Houby circa 1309, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Nel 1330, la sua occupazione è indicata come keeper of the peace nel Leicestershire, England. Morì dopo il 6 novembre 1347, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas de Chaworthは約1290年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアでWilliam de ChaworthとJoanの息子として生まれた。約1309年にイギリスでAlice Houbyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。1330年，イギリスレアイセステルシュアイアでの職業はkeeper of the peaceと記録されている。彼は1347年11月6日以後にイギリスイギリスで死去した。

ko.Westminster Abbey, Westminster, London,: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 웨스트민스터 웨스트민스터 애브브이
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas de Chaworth(은)는 대략 1290년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르에서 William de Chaworth(와)과 Joan의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1309년 영국에서 Alice Houby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1330년, 그의 직업은 영국 레이스스터실르에서 keeper of the peace이었다. 그는 1347년 11월 6일 이후 영국 잉글랜드에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Thomas de Chaworth nasceu aproximadamente 1290, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de William de Chaworth e Joan. Ele casou-se com Alice Houby aproximadamente 1309, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Em 1330, sua profissão aparece como keeper of the peace em Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu após 6 de novembro de 1347, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Westminster Abbey, Westminster, London,: вестминстир эбби, вестминстир, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Thomas de Chaworth родился около 1290 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали William de Chaworth и Joan. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Houby около 1309 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. В 1330 году он работал по профессии keeper of the peace в местности лисестиршир, Англия. Он умер после 6 ноябрь 1347 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Alice Houby aproximadamente 1309, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. En 1330, su ocupación registrada era keeper of the peace en Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Murió después de 6 de noviembre de 1347, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
